name: Apple Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder; add salt.
2. Cut in shortening with two spatulas until crumbly.
3. Add milk, mix quickly and lightly to form a dough.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured board.
5. Roll into an oblong sheet about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Brush with melted butter or oil.
7. Spread apples evenly over the dough.
8. Sprinkle with mixed brown sugar and cinnamon.
9. Roll up like a jelly roll, starting at one end.
10. Cut rolls 1 1/2 inches thick.
11. Place in an ungreased baking dish.
12. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for about 40 minutes.
Anna D. Larsen, Alpha, MN
MM by Cathy Svitek
